name: NKG2D-CAR T cells eliminate senescent cells in aged mice and nonhuman primates
short_name: NKG2D CAR T aged mice and primates
summary: A Science Translational Medicine study showing that NKG2D ligands are upregulated on senescent cells and testing NKG2D-CAR T cells in senescent cell systems, aged mice, irradiated mice, and aged nonhuman primates.
